upasargachandrika.example_text: 'vedA enaM SabdamarTavantaM kalpayizyanti yadi kalpayitavyaM prasaMsyanti' (mI0 115 SA0 BA0) pramaMsyanti pramaMsyante niScezyante
'dizwyA na vimatiM kAYcid BajitvA tu parAjitaH' (BA0 Salya0 6427) vimatirviparItA matiH
'tadu ha SOnakaH kApeyaH pratimanvAnaH pratyeyAya' (CAM0 u0 437) tad (brahmacAriRo vacaH) pratimanvAno manasA vimfSan prativaktuM cintayannityarTaH
'na hi vaScaramaM cana vasizWaH parimaMsate' (f0 7593) na hi parimaMsate varjayitvA na stOti
'vaco vaH samavetArTaM tAtEtadupamanmahe' (BA0 pu0 uttarArDe 108522) upamanmahe pratImaH jAnImaH nArTa upena upasya cehEva manutinA yogo netaratra
